label: No Answer
description: Fires when the call rings but nobody picks up.

steps.message: Hi {{firstName}}, this is {{agentName}} - I tried calling you about your property at {{address}}. I would love to connect when you have a moment. Feel free to call or text me back at {{agentPhone}}.
Hey {{firstName}}, just following up! I specialize in this neighborhood and have some ideas that could help. When is a good time to chat? - {{agentName}}

label: Left Voicemail
description: Fires when an answering machine is detected.

steps.message: Hi {{firstName}}, I just left you a voicemail! I am {{agentName}} and I had a quick question about your property at {{address}}. Text me back here or call {{agentPhone}} when you get a chance.

label: Short Call (under 30s)
description: Fires when someone picks up but hangs up quickly.

steps.message: Hi {{firstName}}, looks like we got cut off! This is {{agentName}} - I was calling about {{address}}. Happy to connect via text if that is easier. {{agentPhone}}

label: Hot Lead
description: Fires when you mark a contact as a Hot Lead after a call.

steps.message: Hi {{firstName}}, great talking with you! As promised, here is my info: {{agentName}}, {{agentPhone}}. I will follow up soon about next steps for {{address}}.
Hey {{firstName}}, {{agentName}} again. I pulled some comps for your area - the numbers look really strong right now. Want me to send them over?

label: Callback Scheduled
description: Fires when you log a Callback Scheduled disposition.

steps.message: Hi {{firstName}}, it is {{agentName}}! Just confirming our call - looking forward to connecting. My number is {{agentPhone}} if anything changes.
